title: Inside Information or Just Being Smart? The Polymarket Insider Trading Test
excerpt: A Google engineer allegedly turned his employer's secret data into $1.2 million in trading profits. Now a landmark legal case is asking a question nobody has answered yet: can you commit insider trading on a prediction market?

title: To the Moon -- But Who Pays? SpaceX's IPO and the Price of a Vision
excerpt: SpaceX wants to raise more money from public investors than almost any company in history. The catch? It is still losing money. So why would anyone buy in?
